zh.Ogle, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德奧格爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington於大約1250年出生時，他的父親Sir Hugh Gobion III33歲，母親Matilda33歲。他於大約1270年與Joan Morrel在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德奧格爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1302年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1317年之前在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯希爾文頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington于大约1250年出生时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Gobion III33岁，母亲Matilda33岁。他于大约1270年与Joan Morrel在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德奧格爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1302年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1317年之前在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯希爾文頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gobion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Bhola, Boodram, Mohan, Narine, Parmanand, Pooran, Shiva.  French Andre, Marcelle, Pierre.
French: from a pet form of   Gobert  .

variants.name: Gobert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Antoine, Marie-France, Monique.

French, German, and English (London): from a medieval personal name, Godebert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was popularized in England by the Normans, and probably absorbed an Old English form Godbeorht.

variants.name: Goben
meanings: Altered form of Gobin , a surname of English or French origin. In some cases however, the surname Goben (possibly of German origin; see 2 below) was changed to Gobin.
German (Göben): habitational name from Gobbin on Rügen Island (Pomerania) or perhaps from any of several places called Goben in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington was born about 1250, his father, Sir Hugh Gobion III, was 33 and his mother, Matilda, was 33. He married Joan Morrel about 1270, in Ogle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1302, at the age of 53, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died before 1317, in Shilvington, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington est né environ 1250, son père, Sir Hugh Gobion III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan Morrel environ 1270, à Ogle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1302, à l’âge de 53 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé avant 1317, à Shilvington, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington um 1250 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Gobion III 33 und seine Mutter Matilda 33. Er hat um 1270 in Ogle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Joan Morrel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1302, als er 53 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1317 in Shilvington, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington è nato il circa 1250, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Gobion III, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Matilda, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan Morrel circa 1270, nel Ogle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1302, all'età di 53 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì prima del 1317, nel Shilvington, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvingtonが約1250年に生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Gobion IIIは33歳，母Matildaは33歳であった。約1270年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドオグルでJoan Morrelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1302年，53歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1317年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスシュイルヴィントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington(이)가 대략 1250년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Gobion III(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 오글에서 Joan Morrel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1302년, 53세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1317년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 시뱅그턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington nasceu aproximadamente 1250, seu pai, Sir Hugh Gobion III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Morrel aproximadamente 1270, em Ogle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1302, com 53 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu antes 1317, em Shilvington, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington родился около 1250 г., его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Gobion III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Morrel около 1270 г. в местности огл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1302 году, в возрасте 53 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер перед 1317 г. в местности шилвингтон, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Gobion IV of Shilvington nació aproximadamente 1250, su papá, Sir Hugh Gobion III, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Matilda, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan Morrel aproximadamente 1270, en Ogle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1302, a la edad de 53 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió antes de 1317, en Shilvington, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
